welcome_carrier: Register Hotels, Flights, Buses, Cruises & more to grow with us.
save_big: Save big with AI-powered flight recommendations & exclusive discounts.
chat_assistant_sub: Unlock exclusive savings up to 25% on selected routes
chat_assistant_desc: Have specific schedule constraints or looking for the absolute best fare? Type query to get recommendations and book directly from the AI chat.
publish_schedules: Publish route schedules directly to users
try_adjusting: Try adjusting your dates or airports.
ai_super_search_desc: Enter your flight requirements in natural English and let the AI find & select flights instantly!
ai_super_search_placeholder: E.g., 'Fly from Delhi to Mumbai tomorrow'
why_flyfast_reason1: No hidden payment gateway fees or convenience charges
why_flyfast_reason3: Interactive 3D Seating maps with no standard selection fees
footer_brand_desc: FlyFast is a next-generation AI-powered booking platform providing instantaneous flight comparison, smart seating, and premium customer service options.
login_subtitle: Manage your bookings and check in easily
register_subtitle: Join FlyFast and start your journey
phone_otp_note: We will send an OTP to this number.
otp_sent_desc: We have sent an OTP code to your registered mobile number
refunds_intro: At FlyFast, we believe in a hassle-free cancellation and refund process.
refunds_policy_desc_1: Cancellations initiated through the FlyFast app within the eligibility window qualify for a 100% instant refund of the base fare.
refunds_policy_desc_2: Unlike traditional booking agents, FlyFast does not charge additional transaction fees upon ticket cancellation.
refunds_step_1: Navigate to the My Bookings console in your profile menu.
refunds_step_2: Locate the active ticket you want to cancel and click the Cancel Ticket button.
refunds_step_3: Your cancellation request will be processed immediately by our automated airline integration.
refunds_step_4: Refund proceeds are instantly transferred back to your original source account (UPI, Bank Account, or Card).
terms_intro: By using FlyFast, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and regulations.
terms_desc_1: FlyFast acts as a real-time reservation gateway connecting passengers directly with registered airline carrier APIs. All pricing, schedules, and flight statuses are verified instantly.
terms_desc_2: Seat allocations and meal preferences submitted via our chatbot or details form are synced immediately with the airline partners. Seating upgrades may incur convenience costs based on airline rules.
terms_desc_3: Airline operators are solely responsible for ensuring exact flight paths, scheduling accuracy, and fare compliance when inputting data in the operator console.
terms_desc_4: We secure customer information, UPI credentials, and booking histories using industry-standard SSL encryption. Your data is strictly shared with active carrier operators to verify boarding lists.
tooltip_register_business: Onboard a new travel business brand
tooltip_partner_login: Log in to the corporate operator panel
try_relaxing_filters: Try checking or relaxing your filters.
interactive_ai_recommendations_desc: Ask our AI travel assistant to help you locate cheaper fares or find specific departure windows.
invalid_identifier: Enter a valid email or E.164 phone (e.g. +919876543210)
places_to_visit_desc: Unlock scenic tourist destinations and premium accommodations directly from the navigation bar tabs above.
places_agra_desc: Witness the monumental symbol of eternal love.
places_agra_details: Agra is home to the iconic Taj Mahal, a UNESCO World Heritage site and monument of eternal love built by Mughal Emperor Shah Jahan. The city also features Agra Fort, Akbar's Tomb, and Fatehpur Sikri, offering a deep dive into rich heritage.
places_agra_highlights: Taj Mahal Visit, Agra Fort Exploration, Traditional Mughal Cuisine tasting, Sunset over Yamuna River
places_goa_desc: Soak in the sun at India's favorite beach paradise.
places_goa_details: Goa is renowned for its spectacular beaches, vibrant nightlife, Portuguese colonial architecture, and active water sports culture. North Goa offers lively clubs and busy coastlines, while South Goa offers tranquil, serene beaches.
places_goa_highlights: Beach hopping (Baga, Calangute, Palolem), Water sports & Scuba diving, Portuguese Forts visit, Seafood dining
places_kerala_desc: Unwind on a peaceful houseboat cruise through nature.
places_kerala_details: Alleppey (Alappuzha) backwaters in Kerala are a vast, serene network of lakes, canals, and rivers. Cruising in a traditional houseboat allows you to witness scenic coconut groves, local fishing villages, and rich green landscape.
places_kerala_highlights: Overnight Houseboat Cruise, Traditional Kerala Meals, Ayurvedic wellness therapies, Bird Sanctuary visits
places_udaipur_desc: Experience royal luxury floating on serene waters.
places_udaipur_details: Taj Lake Palace is a heritage hotel featuring stunning white marble architecture, built in 1746 by Maharana Jagat Singh II. Located on Lake Pichola, it offers royal luxury dining, vintage car tours, and boat cruises.
places_udaipur_highlights: Floating lake views, Fine-dining royal experience, Jharokha window architecture, Spa boat cruise
places_delhi_desc: Colonial-style heritage hotel in the heart of Delhi.
places_delhi_details: Built in 1931, The Imperial is an award-winning colonial-style luxury hotel situated near Connaught Place. It features high ceilings, lush green gardens, a historic collection of museum art, and top-tier dining.
places_delhi_highlights: Heritage art walk, Royal afternoon tea, Multi-cuisine fine dining, Luxury wellness spa
places_coorg_desc: Cozy estate cottage overlooking coffee valleys.
places_coorg_details: Cloud-Mist Villa is a peaceful estate cottage nestled in the coffee plantations of Coorg. Wake up to misty mornings, fresh mountain air, scenic valley views, and local Kodava cuisine.
places_coorg_highlights: Coffee plantation tour, Campfire under the stars, Trekking to Abbey Falls, Authentic Kodava meals
places_ooty_desc: Scenic overnight luxury sleeper bus routes.
places_ooty_details: Travel from the bustling tech hub of Bangalore to the serene hill station of Ooty in a premium sleeper bus. The journey passes through scenic forest areas, tea gardens, and the famous Bandipur Tiger Reserve hairpin curves.
places_ooty_highlights: Bandipur Tiger Reserve views, Overnight luxury sleeper, Tea garden sightseeing, Ooty Lake boating
places_lakshadweep_desc: Cruise through pristine lagoons and coral reefs.
places_lakshadweep_details: Embark on a luxury cruise to the pristine islands of Lakshadweep. Discover turquoise blue waters, rich marine life, white sand beaches, and coral reefs through snorkeling, kayaking, and glass-bottom boat tours.
places_lakshadweep_highlights: Snorkeling and scuba diving, Coral reef view tours, Kayaking in blue lagoons, Shipboard dining
places_ajanta_desc: Explore ancient rock-cut Buddhist and Hindu monuments.
places_ajanta_details: Witness the spectacular 30 rock-cut Buddhist cave monuments of Ajanta and 34 caves of Ellora, dating from the 2nd century BCE to the 10th century CE. The magnificent Kailash Temple in Ellora is a engineering marvel.
places_ajanta_highlights: Kailash Temple (Ellora), Ancient rock-cut murals, Buddhist monastery carvings, Archaeological museum tour
tamilnadu_places_title: Places to Visit in Tamil Nadu
tamilnadu_places_desc: Discover the historic temples, misty hill stations, and sun-kissed coasts of Tamil Nadu.
places_ooty_tn_desc: Escape to the lush tea gardens and cool mountain air of Ooty.
places_ooty_tn_details: Ooty is a gorgeous hill station in the Nilgiri Hills of Tamil Nadu. Famed for its vast tea estates, colonial-era bungalows, Nilgiri Mountain Railway toy train, and serene gardens, it offers a refreshing mountain retreat.
places_ooty_tn_highlights: Nilgiri Mountain Railway ride, Ooty Lake boating, Botanical Garden stroll, Doddabetta Peak trek
places_madurai_tn_desc: Explore the architectural grandeur of Meenakshi Amman Temple.
places_madurai_tn_details: Madurai is one of India's oldest continuously inhabited cities. Built around the historic Meenakshi Amman Temple, it is renowned for its vibrant festival celebrations, incredible gopuram carvings, and flavorful local culinary heritage.
places_madurai_tn_highlights: Meenakshi Temple tour, Tirumalai Nayakkar Palace light show, Shopping for Madurai Sungudi sarees, Local street food tour
places_mahabalipuram_tn_desc: Gaze upon UNESCO-listed rock temples by the Bay of Bengal.
places_mahabalipuram_tn_details: Mahabalipuram is a historic town known for its UNESCO-listed group of Pallava monuments. Located on the coast of the Bay of Bengal, the Shore Temple, Five Rathas, and detailed rock carvings are breathtaking engineering feats of the 7th century.
places_mahabalipuram_tn_highlights: Shore Temple sunset walk, Five Rathas rock carvings, Arjuna's Penance relief, Beachside seafood dining
places_kodaikanal_tn_desc: Unwind around the misty lakes and pine forests.
places_kodaikanal_tn_details: Kodaikanal is a misty hill town situated in the Palani Hills of Tamil Nadu. Centered around a man-made star-shaped lake, it features scenic forest trails, towering pine trees, cool waterfalls, and pleasant weather all year.
places_kodaikanal_tn_highlights: Coaker's Walk viewpoint, Row boating on Kodaikanal Lake, Pine Forest stroll, Pillars Rocks view
places_rameshwaram_tn_desc: Journey across the sea bridge to the holy island.
places_rameshwaram_tn_details: Rameshwaram is a holy town located on Pamban Island, connected to mainland India by the spectacular Pamban sea bridge. It is home to the Ramanathaswamy Temple, featuring the longest corridor of any Hindu temple in the world.
places_rameshwaram_tn_highlights: Pamban Bridge crossing, Ramanathaswamy Temple corridor, Dhanushkodi ghost town exploration, Agnitheertham holy bath
label_search_placeholder: Search by state or place name...
places_jaipur_desc: Explore the royal palaces and vibrant bazaars of Rajasthan's capital.
places_jaipur_details: Jaipur, the capital of Rajasthan, is known for its distinctive pink-colored buildings and stunning Rajput architecture. Visit the grand Amber Fort, the Hawa Mahal, and the City Palace. The city is a living museum of Rajasthan's royal heritage.
places_jaipur_highlights: Amber Fort elephant ride, Hawa Mahal photography, City Palace tour, Local gem shopping at Johari Bazaar
places_bengaluru_desc: Discover India's tech hub with lush parks and vibrant nightlife.
places_bengaluru_details: Bengaluru, India's Silicon Valley, blends modernity with colonial heritage. Explore the sprawling Lalbagh Botanical Garden, the historic Tipu Sultan's Palace, ISKCON temple, and enjoy a thriving craft beer and restaurant scene.
places_bengaluru_highlights: Lalbagh Botanical Garden, Cubbon Park morning walk, UB City luxury shopping, Nandi Hills sunrise trek
places_mumbai_desc: Experience the energy of India's financial capital and entertainment hub.
places_mumbai_details: Mumbai, the city that never sleeps, is a bustling metropolis blending colonial architecture with Bollywood glamour. Visit the iconic Gateway of India, Marine Drive, Elephanta Caves (UNESCO), and Chhatrapati Shivaji Terminus.
places_mumbai_highlights: Gateway of India, Marine Drive sunset, Elephanta Caves UNESCO visit, Dharavi walking tour
places_varanasi_desc: Witness ancient ghats and sacred rituals along the Ganges river.
places_varanasi_details: Varanasi, one of the world's oldest living cities, is a deeply spiritual place where life and death converge on the sacred Ganges ghats. Witness the mesmerizing Ganga Aarti ceremony, explore narrow temple-lined lanes, and visit the ancient Kashi Vishwanath temple.
places_varanasi_highlights: Ganga Aarti ceremony, Boat ride at dawn, Kashi Vishwanath temple visit, Old city heritage walk
places_munnar_desc: Trek through endless rolling tea estates in Kerala's misty highlands.
places_munnar_details: Munnar is a picturesque hill station in Kerala's Western Ghats, famous for its vast tea plantations, spice gardens, and stunning mountain landscapes. Visit the Tea Museum, trek to Anamudi Peak, and spot rare Neelakurinji flowers.
places_munnar_highlights: Tea estate guided walk, Eravikulam National Park, Mattupetty Dam scenic drive, Spice garden tour
places_pondicherry_desc: Stroll through French colonial streets by the Bay of Bengal.
places_pondicherry_details: Pondicherry, a former French colonial territory, offers a unique blend of French and Tamil cultures. The White Town features charming colonial villas, French cafes, and promenades by the sea. Visit Auroville, the international spiritual township.
places_pondicherry_highlights: French Quarter heritage walk, Auroville meditation center, Rock Beach sunrise, Sri Aurobindo Ashram visit
places_goa_hotel_desc: Luxury beachfront resort on the serene shores of South Goa.
places_goa_hotel_details: Taj Exotica is a spectacular 56-acre resort situated on Benaulim beach in South Goa. This elegant property offers private beach access, multiple dining venues, a luxury spa, and world-class water sports facilities in a lush tropical setting.
places_goa_hotel_highlights: Private beach access, Infinity pool with ocean views, Jiva Spa therapy, Multi-cuisine dining with live music
places_kerala_hotel_desc: Heritage resort floating on the scenic Vembanad Lake.
places_kerala_hotel_details: Kumarakom Lake Resort is an award-winning heritage property on the banks of the stunning Vembanad Lake. The resort features traditional Kerala architecture, private pool villas, Ayurvedic rejuvenation programs, and evening cultural performances.
places_kerala_hotel_highlights: Lakefront villa stay, Traditional Ayurvedic treatments, Sunset houseboat cruise, Bird sanctuary boat tour
places_mumbai_hotel_desc: The iconic heritage hotel overlooking the Gateway of India.
places_mumbai_hotel_details: The Taj Mahal Palace, opened in 1903, is one of India's most iconic luxury hotels. Overlooking the Arabian Sea and the Gateway of India, it features stunning Moorish, Oriental, and Florentine architecture, world-class dining, and legendary hospitality.
places_mumbai_hotel_highlights: Gateway of India views, Fine dining at Masala Kraft, Heritage wing heritage tour, Rooftop Sea Lounge cocktails
places_ooty_hotel_tn_desc: A grand colonial-era heritage hotel in the Nilgiri Hills.
places_ooty_hotel_tn_details: The Savoy Hotel in Ooty, established in 1829, is one of India's oldest heritage hotels. Set amidst manicured gardens and pine trees, the colonial-era cottages offer an authentic hill station experience with modern comforts.
places_ooty_hotel_tn_highlights: Colonial garden cottages, Rose garden walks, Archery and croquet lawns, Traditional high tea service
places_goa_homestay_desc: A rustic stay surrounded by aromatic spice plantations.
places_goa_homestay_details: A charming heritage homestay nestled in a working spice plantation in Ponda, Goa. Guests wake up to the fragrance of cardamom, pepper, and nutmeg, enjoy home-cooked Goan meals, and take guided plantation tours.
places_goa_homestay_highlights: Spice plantation guided tour, Home-cooked Goan fish curry lunch, Cashew feni tasting, Bird watching morning walks
places_wayanad_desc: Wake up to misty jungle mornings in a scenic treetop cottage.
places_wayanad_details: Wayanad's treehouse stays offer a magical experience of living amidst the dense tropical jungle. Wake up to sounds of wildlife, trek through ancient caves, visit tribal villages, and experience authentic Kerala forest living.
places_wayanad_highlights: Treetop sunrise views, Edakkal Cave rock carvings visit, Chembra Peak trek, Tribal village cultural tour
places_lonavala_desc: A cozy hilltop retreat in the misty Sahyadri mountains.
places_lonavala_details: Tiger's Lair is a premium hillside resort in Lonavala, situated in the scenic Sahyadri mountain range. Offering stunning valley views, infinity pools, and adventure activities, it's the perfect weekend escape from Mumbai and Pune.
places_lonavala_highlights: Bhushi Dam waterfall walk, Rajmachi Fort trek, Local chikki shopping, Valley view sunset
places_lonavala_best_time: June to September (Monsoon), October to February
places_goa_bus_desc: Breezy coastal bus routes connecting Goa's best beaches.
places_goa_bus_details: Hop on Goa's iconic Kadamba buses and explore the state's stunning coastline. The Panaji to Calangute route passes through scenic coastal villages, local markets, and offers stunning glimpses of the Arabian Sea.
places_goa_bus_highlights: Calangute and Baga beach stops, Local market browsing, Panaji old city walk, Church of Our Lady of Immaculate Conception visit
places_jaipur_bus_desc: Premium Volvo bus connecting Delhi to the Pink City.
places_jaipur_bus_details: The Delhi to Jaipur Volvo bus is one of India's most popular intercity routes, covering 280 km in about 5-6 hours. Premium AC sleeper buses depart multiple times daily, offering a comfortable journey through Rajasthan's golden landscape.
places_jaipur_bus_highlights: Comfortable AC Volvo coaches, Multiple daily departures, Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, Jantar Mantar access
places_pondicherry_bus_desc: A scenic East Coast Road drive to the French Quarter.
places_pondicherry_bus_details: The Chennai to Pondicherry route along the East Coast Road (ECR) is one of South India's most scenic drives. State government buses run frequently, passing through beautiful fishing villages, beach resorts, and historic Mahabalipuram.
places_pondicherry_bus_highlights: East Coast Road scenic views, Mahabalipuram stop option, Pondicherry White Town walk, Auroville visit
places_mysore_bus_desc: Luxury AC bus to the heritage city of palaces.
places_mysore_bus_details: The Bengaluru to Mysore premium bus service covers 145 km in about 3 hours. Mysore is famous for its stunning Mysore Palace, silk weaving, sandalwood products, and the world-famous Dasara festival celebrations.
places_mysore_bus_highlights: Mysore Palace illumination visit, Brindavan Gardens water fountain, Chamundi Hills temple trek, Silk weaving unit tour
places_goa_cruise_desc: Sail along the Mandovi River watching the golden Goa sunset.
places_goa_cruise_details: The famous Mandovi River cruise in Goa features live Goan folk music, traditional Dekhni dance performances, and breathtaking views of the Fort Aguada and Old Goa churches as the sun sets over the Arabian Sea.
places_goa_cruise_highlights: Live Goan folk music and dance, Sunset views over Fort Aguada, Old Goa riverside vistas, Open-deck cocktail bar
places_kerala_cruise_desc: An overnight luxury houseboat through Kerala's serene backwaters.
places_kerala_cruise_details: Kerala's Kettuvallam (rice boat) cruise is an unforgettable experience through the Vembanad Lake and Alleppey backwaters. These premium houseboats feature air-conditioned cabins, sun decks, and on-board chefs serving authentic Kerala cuisine.
places_kerala_cruise_highlights: Overnight houseboat cruise, Authentic Kerala meals on board, Village life views, Fishing net demonstrations
places_rameshwaram_cruise_desc: Experience the sacred Pamban strait and Gulf of Mannar waters.
places_rameshwaram_cruise_details: Take a scenic boat cruise from Rameshwaram to explore the Pamban strait and the waters of the Gulf of Mannar Marine National Park. Spot dolphins, sea turtles, and vibrant coral reefs in one of India's most biodiverse marine zones.
places_rameshwaram_cruise_highlights: Dolphin and turtle sightings, Gulf of Mannar coral reefs, Pamban Bridge views from water, Dhanushkodi approach by boat
places_jaipur_tour_desc: A guided journey through Jaipur's most iconic royal monuments.
places_jaipur_tour_details: This curated 2-day heritage tour of Jaipur covers all the iconic royal landmarks: the grand Amber Fort with its stunning Sheesh Mahal (mirror palace), the iconic Hawa Mahal, City Palace museum, Jantar Mantar astronomical observatory, and bustling bazaars.
places_jaipur_tour_highlights: Amber Fort elephant ride, Hawa Mahal photography, Jantar Mantar observatory, Johari Bazaar gem shopping
places_delhi_tour_desc: From Mughal monuments to Lutyens' Delhi in one epic tour.
places_delhi_tour_details: Explore Delhi's rich 3,000-year history across Old Delhi and New Delhi. Visit the magnificent Red Fort, Jama Masjid, Qutub Minar (UNESCO), India Gate, Humayun's Tomb, and the peaceful Lodhi Garden in a curated full-day tour.
places_delhi_tour_highlights: Red Fort sound and light show, Qutub Minar UNESCO visit, India Gate sunset, Chandni Chowk street food tour
places_mysore_tour_desc: Explore the royal opulence of Mysore Palace and misty Coorg.
places_mysore_tour_details: This combined Mysore and Coorg tour covers the stunning Mysore Palace (illuminated with 97,000 bulbs on Sundays), Chamundi Hills temple, Brindavan Gardens, and then the lush coffee estates of Coorg.
places_mysore_tour_highlights: Mysore Palace Sunday illumination, Brindavan Gardens fountain display, Chamundi Hills trek, Coorg coffee plantation visit
places_kashi_desc: Follow the ancient spiritual path to Lord Shiva's holiest temple.
places_kashi_details: Kashi (Varanasi) Vishwanath Temple is one of the most sacred Hindu temples, dedicated to Lord Shiva. The newly built Kashi Vishwanath Corridor provides a magnificent approach to the temple with stunning views of the Ganges and the ancient city.
places_kashi_highlights: Kashi Vishwanath temple darshan, Ganga Aarti ceremony at Dashashwamedh Ghat, Sacred Ghats boat tour, Banaras Hindu University campus visit
